summary: Iteration 13 - Backend API Testing for AI Chat, Recurring (SIPs), and Transactions. All 13 tests PASSED (100%). Backend APIs are working correctly. The fixes applied by main agent are verified: 1) AI Chat endpoint returns proper 'content' field, 2) Recurring endpoint returns 3 SIPs with correct structure, 3) Investment transactions have positive amounts in backend.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Chat endpoint (POST /api/ai/chat) returns proper response with 'content', 'role', 'id', 'created_at' fields
AI History endpoint (GET /api/ai/history) returns list of messages with correct structure
Recurring endpoint (GET /api/recurring) returns 3 SIPs: HDFC Mid-Cap Fund SIP (₹5000/monthly), PPF Annual (₹150000/yearly), NPS Monthly (₹10000/monthly)
All investment transactions have positive amounts in backend (amounts are stored as positive values)
Frontend code at transactions.tsx line 531 correctly shows no negative sign for investments: {txn.type === 'income' ? '+' : txn.type === 'investment' ? '' : '-'}
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs verified working. AI Chat returns proper 'content' field. Recurring endpoint returns 3 SIPs. Investment transactions have positive amounts. The user-reported issues were frontend-related (AI endpoint path change from /ai-advisor/* to /ai/*, transaction display sign). Backend is functioning correctly.

POST /api/ai/chat.sample_response: AI returns financial advice with savings rate calculation

GET /api/ai/history.returns: List of chat messages with id, role, content, created_at

issue_1_ai_bot_request_failed.root_cause: Frontend was calling /ai-advisor/* endpoints instead of /ai/*
issue_1_ai_bot_request_failed.fix_applied: Changed endpoints to /ai/chat and /ai/history in AIAdvisorChat.tsx

issue_2_sip_negative_sign.root_cause: Frontend display logic was showing negative sign for investments
issue_2_sip_negative_sign.fix_applied: Changed transactions.tsx line 531 to show no sign for investments
issue_2_sip_negative_sign.backend_status: Working correctly - amounts stored as positive values

issue_3_sip_not_in_recurring.root_cause: Frontend was not fetching from /api/recurring endpoint
issue_3_sip_not_in_recurring.backend_status: Working correctly - returns 3 SIPs with correct structure
